chunks.title: Cyrus's Decree to Rebuild the Temple
chunks.reason: Contains the full proclamation of Cyrus inviting the exiles to return and rebuild.

chunks.title: The People's Response to the Decree
chunks.reason: Describes the reaction of the leaders and neighbors as they prepare for the journey.

chunks.title: Return of Temple Articles by Sheshbazzar
chunks.reason: Details the inventory and transfer of sacred vessels from Babylon to Jerusalem.
